items.title: Acting Secretary of the Navy Hung Cao Delivers Memorial Day Message

items.unit_name: Office of the Secretary of the Navy

items.title: Acting Secretary of the Navy Hung Cao Attends Naval Academy Graduation
items.description: Acting Secretary of the Navy Hung Cao attended the Class of 2026 Naval Academy graduation ceremony and gave a speech to the newly-commissioned Navy and Marine Corps officers in Annapolis, MD. Cao's son graduated with the class and he had the unique experience of signing his commission personally and swearing him in as a Second Lieutenant in the United States Marine Corps. (U.S. Navy video by Austin Rooney/released)
items.unit_name: Office of the Secretary of the Navy

items.title: 2nd Cavalry Regiment Freedom 250 Shoutout
items.description: Col. Donald Near, Jr., Regimental Commander of the 2nd Cavalry Regiment, leads the regiment in delivering a shout-out in honor of the 250th birthday of the United States of America in Vilseck, Germany, May 26, 2026. 2CR provides V Corps with a lethal and agile force capable of rapid deployment throughout the European theater in order to assure Allies, deter adversaries, and when ordered, defend the NATO alliance. items.title: TRICARE expands temporary prescription refill waivers to Riverside County, California, due to wildfires
items.description: FALLS CHURCH, Virginia – The Defense Health Agency announced that TRICARE beneficiaries in Riverside County, California, may receive emergency prescription refills now through May 30, due to wildfires.

items.title: TRICARE authorizes temporary prescription refill waivers for 7 Iowa counties due to severe storms
items.description: FALLS CHURCH, Virginia – The Defense Health Agency announced that TRICARE beneficiaries in seven Iowa counties may receive emergency prescription refills now through May 31, due to severe storms.

items.title: 21st Operational Weather Squadron and Fleet Weather Center Aviation Detachment Freedom 250 Shout-out
items.description: United States Airmen and Sailors assigned to the 21st Operational Weather Squadron and Fleet Weather Center Aviation Detachment deliver a shout-out in honor of the 250th birthday of the United States at Kapaun Air Station, Germany. The 21st OWS and FWCAD provide weather support to U.S. European Command and U.S. Africa Command. (U.S. Air Force video by Airman 1st Class Ivory Stoker)

items.title: 52nd FW Freedom 250 Shout-out
items.description: U.S. Airmen assigned to the 52nd Fighter Wing deliver a shout‑out in honor of the 250th birthday of the United States at Spangdahlem Air Base, Germany. The 52nd FW sustains rapid‑response, combat‑ready forces capable of suppressing enemy air defenses, projecting airpower, and supporting NATO operations across Europe.

items.title: Honoring the Fallen: LRMC Deputy Commander Lays Wreath at Saint-Mihiel American Cemetery
items.description:
Nestled among the rolling hills of northeastern France’s Grand Est region, the Saint-Mihiel American Cemetery spans 40 acres and serves as the final resting place for 4,153 American service members who died during World War I.
On May 24, American and French military officials, local dignitaries and civilians gathered at the historic cemetery to honor the fallen service members buried there during a Memorial Day ceremony.
